title: Podman build does not accept output option on WSL2 due to machine remoteness
body:
### Bug description

podman-build does not support --output option on Windows/WSL2 while [must](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-build.1.html#output-o-output-opts) support

### Operating system

Windows 10

### Version

1.0.x

### Steps to reproduce

Install WSL2
Install Podman Desktop
Try to build any image with --output option

### Relevant log output

```shell
$ podman build . -o build
Error: '--output' option is not supported in remote mode
```


### Additional context

```
$ wsl --list -v
  NAME                      STATE           VERSION
* Ubuntu                    Stopped         2
  podman-machine-default    Running         2
  docker-desktop            Stopped         2
  docker-desktop-data       Running         2
```

```
$ podman machine info
Host:
  Arch: amd64
  CurrentMachine: podman-machine-default
  DefaultMachine: ""
  EventsDir: C:\Users\inkle\.local\share\containers\podman\podman
  MachineConfigDir: C:\Users\inkle\.config\containers\podman\machine\wsl
  MachineImageDir: C:\Users\inkle\.local\share\containers\podman\machine\wsl
  MachineState: Running
  NumberOfMachines: 1
  OS: windows
  VMType: wsl
Version:
  APIVersion: 4.5.0
  Built: 1681485669
  BuiltTime: Fri Apr 14 18:21:09 2023
  GitCommit: 75e3c12579d391b81d871fd1cded6cf0d043550a
  GoVersion: go1.20.2
  Os: windows
  OsArch: windows/amd64
  Version: 4.5.0
```

Machine is rootful

comments.body: I've transferred the issue to podman repository as it's about 'podman' remote cli
Changed to a feature request given Podman indicates that the `--output` is currently not supported on remote.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
